sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104889" key="trigwnokratore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐγωνο-κρᾰτορέω</orth>, <sense id="n104889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rule a zodiacal triangle,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.6</biblScope> </bibl>: hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐγωνο-κρᾰτορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
